reason: No ephemeral PostgreSQL instance available in this environment (no psql/pg_ctl binary found via `which`) and Docker was not accepted as a mandatory dependency per mission section 5's prohibition on introducing Docker as a required tool. This status does NOT authorize a Production migration (mission section 20).

tooling_checked.sqlite3_cli: not found (node:sqlite used elsewhere in this project via the built-in module, not the CLI)

static_validation_performed.idempotent_ddl_confirmed: every CREATE TABLE/ADD COLUMN/CREATE INDEX uses IF [NOT] EXISTS -- enforced by automated test scripts/scrapers/__tests__/market-index-migration-safety.test.ts
static_validation_performed.no_destructive_statement_confirmed: no DROP TABLE/DROP COLUMN/TRUNCATE/DELETE/UPDATE/destructive RENAME found in any active (non-rollback-comment) SQL -- same automated test

schema_assumption_cross_check.method: read-only Supabase JS client select(*).limit(1) against live Production, see docs/MARKET_INDEX_EXISTING_MODEL_AUDIT.md
schema_assumption_cross_check.conclusion: The 5 migrations' assumptions about existing table shape (property_listings.id as bigint-compatible PK, listing_sources.id as bigint-compatible PK, listing_sources.property_listing_id as FK) are confirmed against the actual live schema, reducing (not eliminating) the risk of a schema-mismatch failure on eventual Production application.
